title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aster DM Healthcare Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aster DM Healthcare Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Surgeon with drive and ambition, Aster DM Healthcare Capital India in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Aster DM Healthcare Capital India:
Aster DM Healthcare Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare Capital India!
